rng_provenance.source: Cloudflare League of Entropy drand beacon
rng_provenance.note: SHA256(randomness_hex + salt)[:4] as uint32. Pre-dates analysis run.

eg_sign_convention: positive = more NDP wasted (UCP structural advantage); per szat.py

hypothesis.H0: The minority-majority commission proposals differ in their partisan-metric position by no more than randomly drawn pairs of neutral constraint-legal maps.
hypothesis.H1: The minority-majority gap exceeds the 95th percentile of random-pair distances (one-tailed, direction pre-specified: minority more UCP-favorable).
hypothesis.pre_commitment: Report regardless of direction per TODO.md Ch1-COMP specification.

version_a_eg_only.interpretation: Observed minority-majority EG gap = +3.92 pp. Null 95th percentile = 3.43 pp. One-tailed p = 0.0303.

version_b_mahalanobis_joint.interpretation: Observed inter-map Mahalanobis distance = 7.1904. Null 95th percentile = 4.3755. p = 0.0001. 3/4 metrics point minority more UCP-favorable.

minority_vs_ensemble.note: Ch1 result (minority absolute position vs neutral ensemble)

majority_vs_ensemble.note: Ch1 result (majority absolute position vs neutral ensemble)

intermap_distance.note: Version B result (minority vs majority, comparison test)

verdict.claim: SUPPORTED at classical threshold on both versions.
verdict.paper_impact: The directional inter-map comparison reaches p < 0.05 on both the EG-only (Version A) and Mahalanobis joint (Version B) tests. Add to §5.4 as Ch1-COMP.
